Constellation of Markmanship Gear

Once in a while, shoots at a random unit on the battlefield:
- If it hits an ally, restores 30% of their max health and that unit goes into a frenzy. The increase in size, and all their stats are increased by 15% for 4 sec. Stacks up to 3 times.
- If it hits an enemy, deals physical damage equal to 30% of their max health and reduces all target's stats by 15% for 4 sec. Stacks up to 3 times.

Requirements: 98-100

User rating: item not rated yet
